name: curiosity-mcp
description: Science & curiosity MCP: explainers across physics/quantum, space/astronomy, life/biology, earth/geoscience, ancient history/archaeology, great scientific minds, and computing/AI — plus a rigorous claim-check loop that separates real science from pseudoscience (ancient aliens, free energy, suppressed-genius myths). Curiosity with honesty. Runs as an asset under orchestrator-mcp.
